title: Lesson 231: (Grammar) - together (with); at the same time; in a lump

intro_cards.title: Together: 一緒に
intro_cards.body:
一緒に (いっしょに) means 'together' or 'at the same time.'

• 一緒に行きましょう！(Let's go together!)
• 友達と一緒に映画を見た。
(I watched a movie together with a friend.)
• 一緒に食べませんか？(Would you like to eat together?)

一緒 as a noun:
• 私たちは一緒だ。(We are together / we're the same.)
• これと一緒にしてください。(Please put this with the rest.)

一緒に vs と:
• と simply marks 'with someone'
• 一緒に emphasizes the togetherness of the shared action
